title: phyteuma nigrum var. atropurpureum
intro: Phyteuma nigrum var. atropurpureum, also known as Purple Rampion or Black Rampion, is a plant species belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It is a biennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat various health conditions due to its expectorant, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from rheumatic pain. Phyteuma nigrum var. atropurpureum can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its therapeutic properties.
